findings.message: owner_email is written to application logs in the item_created audit event. owner_email is PII (the model in db/models.py explicitly comments 'PII: owner email address — do not include in logs or external responses'). Logging it exposes personal data in log sinks, violating the stated handling rule.
findings.suggestion: Drop owner_email from the log call entirely, or log a non-identifying surrogate (e.g. a hash or just item_id): log.info("item_created", item_id=item.id).

Logging it exposes personal data in log sinks, violating the stated handling rule.","suggestion":"Drop owner_email from the log call entirely, or log a non-identifying surrogate (e.g. a hash or just item_id): log.info(\"item_created\", item_id=item.id)."}]
